release_notes: Fixed cloud sync foreign key errors and data loss issues: (1) Fixed foreign key constraint error in cloud upload by disabling FK constraints during bulk operations; (2) Fixed data loss after 2.6.0 update when cloud sync was enabled by checking sync_role in get_connection(); (3) Fixed 'Initialize as Primary' wiping cloud DB with empty local data by adding safety check; (4) Fixed persistent foreign key constraint errors during cloud upload with PRAGMA foreign_keys=OFF/ON.
